units.source_text: 1 袍⾦符合股東於2025年股東周年⼤會上批准的董事薪酬政策。
units.translation_target_text: 1 The fee is in line with the directors’ remuneration policy approved by shareholders at the 2025 Annual General Meeting.
units.translation_en: 1 The fee is in line with the directors’ remuneration policy approved by shareholders at the 2025 Annual General Meeting.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 The fee is in line with the directors’ remuneration policy approved by shareholders at the 2025 Annual General Meeting.

units.source_text: 2 福利包括應課稅開⽀，例如於滙豐控股註冊辦事處出席董事會及其他與會議有關的住宿、差旅及膳食。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Benefits include taxable expenses such as accommodation, travel and meals related to board meetings and other meetings at the registered office of HSBC Holdings.
units.translation_en: 2 Benefits include taxable expenses such as accommodation, travel and meals related to board meetings and other meetings at the registered office of HSBC Holdings.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Benefits include taxable expenses such as accommodation, travel and meals related to board meetings and other meetings at the registered office of HSBC Holdings.

units.source_text: 3 於2025年1⽉31⽇退任集團薪酬委員會成員。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Retired as a member of the Group’s Remuneration Committee on January 31, 2025.
units.translation_en: 3 Retired as a member of the Group’s Remuneration Committee on January 31, 2025.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 Retired as a member of the Group’s Remuneration Committee on January 31, 2025.

units.source_text: 4 包括擔任北美滙豐控股有限公司主席的袍⾦418,000英鎊（2024年：430,000英鎊）。
units.translation_target_text: 4 Includes a fee of £418,000 (2024: £430,000) as Chairman of HSBC Holdings plc North America.
units.translation_en: 4 Includes a fee of £418,000 (2024: £430,000) as Chairman of HSBC Holdings plc North America.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 4 Includes a fee of £418,000 (2024: £430,000) as Chairman of HSBC Holdings plc North America.

units.source_text: 5 於2025年1⽉1⽇獲委任為英國滙豐銀⾏有限公司非執⾏董事，並直⾄2025年4⽉24⽇按比例收取每年105,000英鎊的袍⾦。⾼安賢於2025年4⽉25⽇獲委任為英國
units.translation_target_text: 5 was appointed as a non-executive director of HSBC Bank UK Limited on January 1, 2025, and will receive an annual fee of £105,000 on a pro-rata basis until April 24, 2025. Gao Anxian was appointed as the British Prime Minister on April 25, 2025
units.translation_en: 5 was appointed as a non-executive director of HSBC Bank UK Limited on January 1, 2025, and will receive an annual fee of £105,000 on a pro-rata basis until April 24, 2025. Gao Anxian was appointed as the British Prime Minister on April 25, 2025

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 5 was appointed as a non-executive director of HSBC Bank UK Limited on January 1, 2025, and will receive an annual fee of £105,000 on a pro-rata basis until April 24, 2025. Gao Anxian was appointed as the British Prime Minister on April 25, 2025

units.source_text: 滙豐銀⾏有限公司董事會及提名、薪酬及管治委員會主席，並按比例收取每年300,000英鎊的袍⾦。
units.translation_target_text: Chairman of the Board of Directors and the Nomination, Remuneration and Governance Committee of HSBC Bank Limited, and receives an annual pro rata fee of £300,000.
units.translation_en: Chairman of the Board of Directors and the Nomination, Remuneration and Governance Committee of HSBC Bank Limited, and receives an annual pro rata fee of £300,000.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Chairman of the Board of Directors and the Nomination, Remuneration and Governance Committee of HSBC Bank Limited, and receives an annual pro rata fee of £300,000.
